title: Agent Skill (SKILL.md frontmatter)
description: The YAML frontmatter of an agent skill (Anthropic Agent Skills "SKILL.md"). The markdown body follows the frontmatter and is governed by spotlight:skill.

name.description: Lower kebab-case; matches the skill directory name.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it — drives agent selection.

allowed-tools.description: Tool names the skill may use.
